title: One More Time
why_this_song: One More Time by Daft Punk (2000) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 36 times; first heard in: "We're gonna celebrate"
Appears 28 times; first heard in: "One more time"
Appears 28 times; first heard in: "Celebrate and dance so free"
Appears 22 times; first heard in: "We're gonna celebrate"
Appears 17 times; first heard in: "Mmm, you know I'm just feeling"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "celebrate" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "celebrate" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "time" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "time" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "One More Time" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "One More Time"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Daft Punk one question about "One More Time", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Daft Punk sobre "One More Time", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "One More Time" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "One More Time" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
